name: software-security
description: Software-security domain ontology — vulnerabilities, weaknesses, controls, threat actors, campaigns, indicators of compromise, malware, supply-chain risk, policies, and assessments, grounded in MITRE ATT&CK, CVE/CWE/NVD, NIST 800-53/OSCAL/800-161r1, STIX 2.1, and VERIS. Mints 10 security types; extends mif-base and shared-traits.
